pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py line 26 checks for this exact feed name
Task description and verifier.py line 27 checks for this exact feed name
Task description and verifier.py line 28 checks for this exact feed name
Emoncms GitHub: Engine ID 5 corresponds to PHPFina (php fixed interval no averaging). Verified via https://github.com/emoncms/emoncms/blob/master/Modules/process/process_processlist.php
Task description explicitly requires 10s interval. Verifier checks for interval == 10
Emoncms GitHub process_processlist.php shows id_num 27 => 'Max daily value'. Verifier.py line 20 incorrectly claims PROC_MAX_DAILY = 22, which is actually '- input' (subtract input), not max daily
Emoncms GitHub process_processlist.php shows id_num 28 => 'Min daily value'. Verifier.py line 21 incorrectly claims PROC_MIN_DAILY = 23, which is actually 'kWh to kWh/d', not min daily
Emoncms GitHub process_processlist.php shows id_num 37 => 'Reset to Original'. Verifier.py line 22 incorrectly claims PROC_RESET_ORIGINAL = 24, which is actually 'Allow positive', not reset
Emoncms GitHub process_processlist.php confirms id_num 1 => 'Log to feed'. Verifier.py line 19 correctly claims PROC_LOG_TO_FEED = 1

privileged_info_summary: The task metadata is correct: input_name='greenhouse_temp', node_name='environment', feed names are as specified, engine 5 (PHPFina) with 10-second interval. Data is synthetically generated by a Python script that simulates temperature with a 24-hour sinusoidal curve plus random noise. CRITICAL ISSUE: The verifier.py contains incorrect Emoncms process IDs: it claims PROC_MAX_DAILY=22 (should be 27), PROC_MIN_DAILY=23 (should be 28), and PROC_RESET_ORIGINAL=24 (should be 37). These are verifiable errors when cross-referenced with the official Emoncms GitHub repository.
